tree.setup: You own an apartment that you've been renting out. Your tenant has been living there for five years and recently made significant unauthorized renovations. You're consulting a lawyer about your rights, the tenant's obligations, and how to resolve the situation.
tree.setup_zh: 你有一套公寓一直在出租。租户已经住了五年，最近擅自进行了大规模装修改造。你正在咨询律师关于你的权利、租户的义务以及如何解决这个问题。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 请您先详细说一下情况。租户擅自装修的具体内容是什么？对房屋的原始结构有没有造成改变？另外，你们之间的租赁合同对装修改造这方面有没有明确的约定？
turns.text_pinyin: qǐng nín xiān xiángxì shuō yīxià qíngkuàng. zūhù shànzì zhuāngxiū de jùtǐ nèiróng shì shénme? duì fángwū de yuánshǐ jiégòu yǒu méiyǒu zàochéng gǎibiàn? lìngwài, nǐmen zhījiān de zūlìn hétong duì zhuāngxiū gǎizào zhè fāngmiàn yǒu méiyǒu míngquè de yuēdìng?
turns.text_en: Please describe the situation in detail first. What specifically did the tenant do in terms of unauthorized renovations? Did they alter the original structure of the property? Also, does your lease agreement have any explicit provisions regarding renovations?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Describe the renovation situation and your lease terms.

options.text_zh: 情况是这样的。上个月我去看房的时候发现，租户未经我同意，对房屋进行了三项重大改造：第一，拆除了客厅和书房之间的一面隔墙，把两个房间打通成了一个大空间；第二，在阳台上加建了一个封闭式的储物间；第三，更换了全部的厨房设备和卫生间的管道。其中拆墙这一项涉及到承重结构的改变，我非常担心安全隐患。关于合同方面，我们的租赁合同第八条明确规定：'乙方如需对房屋进行装修或结构性改动，须事先取得甲方书面同意，未经同意擅自改动的，甲方有权要求恢复原状或赔偿损失。'他从头到尾没有跟我提过任何装修计划。
options.text_pinyin: qíngkuàng shì zhèyàng de. shàng gè yuè wǒ qù kàn fáng de shíhou fāxiàn, zūhù wèi jīng wǒ tóngyì, duì fángwū jìnxíng le sān xiàng zhòngdà gǎizào: dì yī, chāichú le kètīng hé shūfáng zhījiān de yī miàn géqiáng, bǎ liǎng gè fángjiān dǎ tōng chéng le yī gè dà kōngjiān; dì èr, zài yángtái shàng jiājiàn le yī gè fēngbì shì de chǔwù jiān; dì sān, gēnghuàn le quánbù de chúfáng shèbèi hé wèishēngjiān de guǎndào. qízhōng chāi qiáng zhè yī xiàng shèjí dào chéngzhòng jiégòu de gǎibiàn, wǒ fēicháng dānxīn ānquán yǐnhuàn. guānyú hétong fāngmiàn, wǒmen de zūlìn hétong dì bā tiáo míngquè guīdìng: 'yǐ fāng rú xū duì fángwū jìnxíng zhuāngxiū huò jiégòu xìng gǎidòng, xū shìxiān qǔdé jiǎ fāng shūmiàn tóngyì, wèi jīng tóngyì shànzì gǎidòng de, jiǎ fāng yǒu quán yāoqiú huīfù yuánzhuàng huò péicháng sǔnshī.' tā cóngtóu dào wěi méiyǒu gēn wǒ tí guò rènhé zhuāngxiū jìhuà.
options.text_en: Here's the situation. When I inspected the property last month, I discovered the tenant had made three major unauthorized modifications: first, they demolished a partition wall between the living room and study, combining two rooms into one large space; second, they built an enclosed storage room on the balcony; third, they replaced all kitchen equipment and bathroom plumbing. The wall demolition in particular involves changes to load-bearing structure, which greatly concerns me regarding safety hazards. Regarding the contract, our lease agreement Article 8 explicitly states: 'If Party B wishes to renovate or make structural changes to the property, prior written consent from Party A is required. Unauthorized modifications entitle Party A to demand restoration to original condition or compensation for damages.' He never mentioned any renovation plans to me at any point.
options.feedback: Exceptionally detailed and well-organized -- itemizes three specific modifications, flags the safety concern about load-bearing walls, and quotes the exact contract clause. This gives the lawyer everything needed to advise you. 承重结构, 安全隐患, 恢复原状, 甲方/乙方, and 书面同意 are precisely used legal vocabulary.

options.text_zh: 租户把墙拆了，阳台也改了，厨房卫生间也换了。合同上好像说过不能随便装修。
options.text_pinyin: zūhù bǎ qiáng chāi le, yángtái yě gǎi le, chúfáng wèishēngjiān yě huàn le. hétong shàng hǎoxiàng shuō guò bù néng suíbiàn zhuāngxiū.
options.text_en: The tenant demolished a wall, modified the balcony, and changed the kitchen and bathroom. The contract says something about not renovating freely, I think.
options.feedback: Too vague for a legal consultation. Lawyers need specific facts: which wall, what structure, exact contract language. 'I think the contract says something' undermines your position -- know your own contract terms.

options.text_zh: 他把我的房子搞得乱七八糟的，根本没跟我商量。我要他马上搬走！
options.text_pinyin: tā bǎ wǒ de fángzi gǎo de luànqībāzāo de, gēnběn méi gēn wǒ shāngliang. wǒ yào tā mǎshàng bān zǒu!
options.text_en: He's made a complete mess of my apartment without consulting me at all. I want him out immediately!
options.feedback: Emotional reaction without providing the facts a lawyer needs. Legal advice requires specific details about what was done, what the contract says, and what outcome you want. Demanding immediate eviction may not be legally feasible.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 明白了。您的情况在法律上是比较有利的，但处理起来需要分步骤进行。首先，关于承重墙的问题——如果确实涉及承重结构的改动，这不仅违反了你们的合同约定，还可能违反了《建筑法》和当地的房屋安全管理规定。您知道这面墙是否是承重墙吗？有没有相关的房屋结构图纸？
turns.text_pinyin: míngbai le. nín de qíngkuàng zài fǎlǜ shàng shì bǐjiào yǒulì de, dàn chǔlǐ qǐlái xūyào fēn bùzhòu jìnxíng. shǒuxiān, guānyú chéngzhòng qiáng de wèntí——rúguǒ quèshí shèjí chéngzhòng jiégòu de gǎidòng, zhè bùjǐn wéifǎn le nǐmen de hétong yuēdìng, hái kěnéng wéifǎn le 'jiànzhù fǎ' hé dāngdì de fángwū ānquán guǎnlǐ guīdìng. nín zhīdào zhè miàn qiáng shìfǒu shì chéngzhòng qiáng ma? yǒu méiyǒu xiāngguān de fángwū jiégòu túzhǐ?
turns.text_en: I see. Your situation is legally favorable, but resolution needs to proceed in stages. First, regarding the load-bearing wall -- if structural modifications are indeed involved, this violates not only your contract but potentially the Construction Law and local building safety regulations. Do you know whether this wall is load-bearing? Do you have the building's structural drawings?

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Answer about the structural drawings and ask about your legal options.

options.text_zh: 房屋的原始结构图纸我保存在购房资料里，可以提供给您。根据图纸显示，客厅和书房之间的那面墙标注为承重墙。我已经拍了现场照片作为证据保全。刘律师，我想了解一下，在这种情况下我有哪些法律救济途径？第一，我能不能要求他恢复原状，特别是承重墙的问题？如果恢复原状在技术上不可行或者成本过高，赔偿标准怎么确定？第二，这种严重违约是否构成合同解除的法定事由？我希望终止租约，但我也担心租户以'居住权保护'为由拒绝搬出。第三，如果走诉讼途径，大概需要多长时间？费用怎么预估？
options.text_pinyin: fángwū de yuánshǐ jiégòu túzhǐ wǒ bǎocún zài gòufáng zīliào lǐ, kěyǐ tígōng gěi nín. gēnjù túzhǐ xiǎnshì, kètīng hé shūfáng zhījiān de nà miàn qiáng biāozhù wéi chéngzhòng qiáng. wǒ yǐjīng pāi le xiànchǎng zhàopiàn zuòwéi zhèngjù bǎoquán. liú lǜshī, wǒ xiǎng liǎojiě yīxià, zài zhè zhǒng qíngkuàng xià wǒ yǒu nǎxiē fǎlǜ jiùjì tújìng? dì yī, wǒ néng bù néng yāoqiú tā huīfù yuánzhuàng, tèbié shì chéngzhòng qiáng de wèntí? rúguǒ huīfù yuánzhuàng zài jìshù shàng bù kěxíng huòzhě chéngběn guò gāo, péicháng biāozhǔn zěnme quèdìng? dì èr, zhè zhǒng yánzhòng wéiyuē shìfǒu gòuchéng hétong jiěchú de fǎdìng shìyóu? wǒ xīwàng zhōngzhǐ zūyuē, dàn wǒ yě dānxīn zūhù yǐ 'jūzhù quán bǎohù' wéi yóu jùjué bān chū. dì sān, rúguǒ zǒu sùsòng tújìng, dàgài xūyào duō cháng shíjiān? fèiyòng zěnme yùgū?
options.text_en: I have the original structural drawings in my property purchase documents and can provide them to you. According to the drawings, the wall between the living room and study is marked as load-bearing. I've already taken photographs of the site for evidence preservation. Lawyer Liu, I'd like to understand what legal remedies are available to me in this situation. First, can I demand restoration to original condition, especially regarding the load-bearing wall? If restoration is technically infeasible or prohibitively expensive, how is the compensation standard determined? Second, does this level of breach constitute legal grounds for contract termination? I want to end the lease, but I'm concerned the tenant might refuse to move out citing 'residential rights protection.' Third, if we pursue litigation, approximately how long would it take? How do we estimate the costs?
options.feedback: Prepared and legally astute -- has evidence ready, identifies the wall as load-bearing from drawings, and asks three precisely targeted questions covering restoration, termination, and litigation practicalities. Anticipating the tenant's possible defense (居住权保护) shows sophistication. 法律救济途径, 证据保全, 法定事由, and 合同解除 are advanced legal vocabulary.

options.text_zh: 图纸我应该有，回去找找。主要想知道能不能让他搬走，还有他要不要赔钱。
options.text_pinyin: túzhǐ wǒ yīnggāi yǒu, huíqù zhǎozhǎo. zhǔyào xiǎng zhīdào néng bù néng ràng tā bān zǒu, hái yǒu tā yào bú yào péi qián.
options.text_en: I should have the drawings, I'll look for them when I get home. Mainly want to know if I can make him move out and if he needs to pay.
options.feedback: The right general questions but lacking specificity. Bring your evidence to the consultation -- a lawyer can advise much more precisely with documents in hand. Ask about specific legal mechanisms, not just outcomes.

options.text_zh: 图纸我记不清有没有了。反正他改了承重墙，肯定是违法的吧？
options.text_pinyin: túzhǐ wǒ jì bù qīng yǒu méiyǒu le. fǎnzhèng tā gǎi le chéngzhòng qiáng, kěndìng shì wéifǎ de ba?
options.text_en: I can't remember if I have the drawings. Anyway, modifying a load-bearing wall is definitely illegal, right?
options.feedback: Asking a lawyer to confirm your assumption isn't productive. Evidence matters in law -- without structural drawings, you can't prove it's a load-bearing wall. Come prepared with documentation.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 您准备得很充分。我给您分析一下法律路径。关于恢复原状，如果承重墙确实被拆除，恢复原状在结构工程上是可行的但成本很高，通常需要请有资质的建筑公司进行加固修复。费用应由租户承担。如果恢复不可行，需要委托专业机构进行房屋价值评估，以评估报告作为赔偿依据。关于合同解除，未经同意改动承重结构属于重大违约，根据《民法典》第五百六十三条，您有权行使法定解除权。至于居住权的问题，法律保护的是合法的居住权益，但不保护违约方。他在严重违约的情况下主张居住权保护在法律上不太站得住脚。
turns.text_pinyin: nín zhǔnbèi de hěn chōngfèn. wǒ gěi nín fēnxī yīxià fǎlǜ lùjìng. guānyú huīfù yuánzhuàng, rúguǒ chéngzhòng qiáng quèshí bèi chāichú, huīfù yuánzhuàng zài jiégòu gōngchéng shàng shì kěxíng de dàn chéngběn hěn gāo, tōngcháng xūyào qǐng yǒu zīzhì de jiànzhù gōngsī jìnxíng jiāgù xiūfù. fèiyòng yīng yóu zūhù chéngdān. rúguǒ huīfù bù kěxíng, xūyào wěituō zhuānyè jīgòu jìnxíng fángwū jiàzhí pínggū, yǐ pínggū bàogào zuòwéi péicháng yījù. guānyú hétong jiěchú, wèi jīng tóngyì gǎidòng chéngzhòng jiégòu shǔyú zhòngdà wéiyuē, gēnjù 'mínfǎ diǎn' dì wǔ bǎi liùshísān tiáo, nín yǒu quán xíngshǐ fǎdìng jiěchú quán. zhìyú jūzhù quán de wèntí, fǎlǜ bǎohù de shì héfǎ de jūzhù quányì, dàn bù bǎohù wéiyuē fāng. tā zài yánzhòng wéiyuē de qíngkuàng xià zhǔzhāng jūzhù quán bǎohù zài fǎlǜ shàng bú tài zhàn de zhù jiǎo.
turns.text_en: You came well-prepared. Let me analyze the legal pathways. Regarding restoration, if the load-bearing wall was indeed demolished, structural restoration is feasible but costly -- typically requiring a licensed construction company for reinforcement repair. Costs should be borne by the tenant. If restoration is infeasible, a professional institution needs to conduct a property value assessment, using the assessment report as the basis for compensation. Regarding contract termination, unauthorized modification of load-bearing structure constitutes material breach, and under Article 563 of the Civil Code, you have the right to exercise statutory termination. As for the residential rights issue, the law protects lawful residential rights, but does not protect the breaching party. Their claim for residential rights protection under serious breach conditions doesn't hold up well legally.

turns.speaker: player
turns.prompt_en: Decide on your course of action and discuss next steps with the lawyer.

options.text_zh: 非常感谢刘律师的详细分析。基于您的建议，我倾向于采取以下步骤：第一步，先委托专业的建筑检测机构对房屋进行安全鉴定，确认承重墙改动的实际影响和安全等级。这既是保护我自己的权益，也是后续索赔或诉讼的关键证据。第二步，由您代表我向租户发一份正式的律师函，援引合同第八条和《民法典》第五百六十三条，通知他解除合同，并要求他在合理期限内——比如三十天——搬出房屋，同时承担恢复原状或者等额赔偿的责任。第三步，如果他拒绝配合，我们再走诉讼程序。我想确认一下，在安全鉴定期间，如果鉴定结果显示房屋存在重大安全隐患，是不是可以向法院申请先行禁令，要求租户立即停止使用该房屋？
options.text_pinyin: fēicháng gǎnxiè liú lǜshī de xiángxì fēnxī. jīyú nín de jiànyì, wǒ qīngxiàng yú cǎiqǔ yǐxià bùzhòu: dì yī bù, xiān wěituō zhuānyè de jiànzhù jiǎncè jīgòu duì fángwū jìnxíng ānquán jiàndìng, quèrèn chéngzhòng qiáng gǎidòng de shíjì yǐngxiǎng hé ānquán děngjí. zhè jì shì bǎohù wǒ zìjǐ de quányì, yěshì hòuxù suǒpéi huò sùsòng de guānjiàn zhèngjù. dì èr bù, yóu nín dàibiǎo wǒ xiàng zūhù fā yī fèn zhèngshì de lǜshī hán, yuányǐn hétong dì bā tiáo hé 'mínfǎ diǎn' dì wǔ bǎi liùshísān tiáo, tōngzhī tā jiěchú hétong, bìng yāoqiú tā zài hélǐ qīxiàn nèi——bǐrú sānshí tiān——bān chū fángwū, tóngshí chéngdān huīfù yuánzhuàng huòzhě děng'é péicháng de zérèn. dì sān bù, rúguǒ tā jùjué pèihé, wǒmen zài zǒu sùsòng chéngxù. wǒ xiǎng quèrèn yīxià, zài ānquán jiàndìng qījiān, rúguǒ jiàndìng jiéguǒ xiǎnshì fángwū cúnzài zhòngdà ānquán yǐnhuàn, shì bú shì kěyǐ xiàng fǎyuàn shēnqǐng xiānxíng jìnlìng, yāoqiú zūhù lìjí tíngzhǐ shǐyòng gāi fángwū?
options.text_en: Thank you very much for the detailed analysis, Lawyer Liu. Based on your advice, I'm inclined to take the following steps. Step one: commission a professional building inspection agency to conduct a safety assessment, confirming the actual impact and safety classification of the load-bearing wall modification. This protects my own rights and provides critical evidence for subsequent claims or litigation. Step two: have you send a formal lawyer's letter on my behalf to the tenant, citing Contract Article 8 and Civil Code Article 563, notifying them of contract termination and requiring them to vacate within a reasonable period -- say 30 days -- while bearing responsibility for restoration or equivalent compensation. Step three: if they refuse to cooperate, we proceed to litigation. I'd like to confirm: during the safety assessment period, if the results show the property has serious safety hazards, can we apply to the court for a preliminary injunction requiring the tenant to immediately cease using the property?
options.feedback: Strategic and methodical -- lays out a clear three-step escalation plan, each step justified. The question about preliminary injunctions shows you understand emergency legal procedures. 安全鉴定, 律师函, 援引, 先行禁令, and 法定解除权 demonstrate advanced legal Chinese. This is the level of engagement lawyers appreciate from clients.

options.text_zh: 好的，那就请您帮我发律师函，要求他搬走并赔偿损失。如果他不搬，我们就起诉。
options.text_pinyin: hǎo de, nà jiù qǐng nín bāng wǒ fā lǜshī hán, yāoqiú tā bān zǒu bìng péicháng sǔnshī. rúguǒ tā bù bān, wǒmen jiù qǐsù.
options.text_en: OK, then please send a lawyer's letter on my behalf demanding he move out and compensate for damages. If he doesn't move, we'll sue.
options.feedback: Decisive but skips an important step -- the building safety assessment. Without professional documentation of the structural damage, your case will be harder to prove. Evidence first, demands second.

options.text_zh: 我直接去找他谈，告诉他我已经咨询了律师，让他自己选是搬走还是被告。
options.text_pinyin: wǒ zhíjiē qù zhǎo tā tán, gàosù tā wǒ yǐjīng zīxún le lǜshī, ràng tā zìjǐ xuǎn shì bān zǒu háishi bèi gào.
options.text_en: I'll go talk to him directly, tell him I've consulted a lawyer, and let him choose between moving out or being sued.
options.feedback: Confrontation without formal legal procedure may backfire. If the tenant records your threats, it could complicate litigation. Let the lawyer handle formal communications through proper channels.

tree.cultural_note: Property law (物权法 wùquán fǎ) in China is governed primarily by the Civil Code (民法典 mínfǎ diǎn). Key concepts include 承重结构 (load-bearing structure), which cannot be modified without engineering approval; 法定解除权 (statutory right of termination) for material breach; and 律师函 (lawyer's letter) as a formal pre-litigation step. In Chinese legal practice, 先行禁令 (preliminary injunction) can be sought for urgent safety concerns. Consulting a lawyer (法律咨询 fǎlǜ zīxún) is increasingly common for property disputes, and coming prepared with documents (合同, 图纸, 照片) dramatically improves the quality of legal advice.
